project: Implement comprehensive observability stack with Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards. Add prometheus client to each Go service exposing /metrics endpoint with custom metrics for: request latency, error rates, active connections, queue sizes, and business metrics (jobs processed, documents stored). Create Grafana dashboards for: service health, request throughput, database performance, Redis operations, and business KPIs. Add alerting rules for critical conditions (high error rate, service down, queue backlog). Deploy monitoring stack via docker-compose with persistent storage. Implement distributed tracing with Jaeger integration.
